topics.title: Scott and Todd Morning Show Anniversary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the 16th anniversary of the Scott and Todd morning show, debating their claims of being the longest-running show in New York compared to the hosts' own tenure.

topics.title: Radio Show Segments and Caller Interactions
topics.summary: The show features a series of segments including discussions about radio career longevity, the production of a film soundtrack, real estate investments, and a humorous interaction with a caller claiming to be a Star Wars character.

topics.title: Star Wars Lore and Media Criticism
topics.summary: The studio explores the history of Darth Nihilus from Star Wars lore before transitioning into a discussion regarding media bias in film reviews and the complexities of military tactics in Iraq.

topics.title: Star Wars Fandom and Show Updates
topics.summary: The studio discusses a guest's Star Wars obsession, upcoming film projects from Richard Christie, and various news updates including celebrity appearances and upcoming segments.

topics.title: Marriage Reconciliation and Respect
topics.summary: The studio features a caller discussing his efforts to rebuild trust and show respect toward his wife following a period of marital strife.

topics.title: Pam Anderson and Hans Klok Magic Show
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation regarding the professional partnership between Pam Anderson and magician Hans Klok for his residency at Planet Hollywood in Las Vegas.

topics.title: Pam Anderson and Tommy Lee's Relationship
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding Pam Anderson's personal life, her relationship with Tommy Lee, and the public reaction to her infamous sex tape.

topics.title: Pam Anderson and Parenting
topics.summary: The show features an interview with Pam Anderson where she and her father discuss her upbringing, her past experiences, and the dynamics of their relationship.

topics.title: Fran Drescher and Cancer Schmancy Movement
topics.summary: The studio hosts a conversation with Fran Drescher regarding her advocacy for early cancer diagnosis through the Cancer Schmancy movement and her potential interest in running for political office.

topics.title: Fran Drescher and Cancer Schmancer Movement
topics.summary: The show features Fran Drescher discussing her survival of uterine cancer, the international success of her television series, and her advocacy for women's gynecologic health through the Cancer Schmancer movement.

topics.title: Sexual Experiences and Workplace Incidents
topics.summary: The studio features callers recounting stories of lost sex toys, workplace disciplinary actions for listening to the show, and various sexual fetishes before concluding with a discussion on local media personalities.

topics.title: Radio Show Comedy and Music Segments
topics.summary: The studio features a series of comedic song parodies about the staff, discussions regarding celebrity interviews with Jimmy Fallon and Michael Moore, and a segment playing tracks from Yoko Ono's new album.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and Historical Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including the musical careers of Bon Jovi and Kelly Clarkson, a legal dispute involving actress Christy Swanson, and a detailed discussion regarding John F. Kennedy Jr.'s life and final flight.

topics.title: New York City Education Incentives and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio discusses a New York City initiative to provide cash incentives for students and adults to stay in school, the resignation of a district attorney involved in the Duke lacrosse case, and reports regarding a suicide bomber graduation video.

topics.title: Bear Attack and Missing Woman Reports
topics.summary: The studio covers a bear attack on a child in Utah, the disappearance of a pregnant woman in Ohio, and various news segments regarding public safety and entertainment.
